reasoning: Preliminary heuristic ranks configs by context recall, citation coverage, faithfulness, answer relevancy, graph hit rate, and a small p95 latency penalty.

metric_definitions.answer_relevancy: Gemini judge score in official runs; current judge_backend=static-smoke.
metric_definitions.citation_coverage_rate: Average citation/source coverage for non-chart-only corpus-grounded items; Direct chart-only items are excluded.
metric_definitions.context_recall: Gemini judge score for corpus-grounded items; chart-only Direct items are excluded from this aggregate and reported as chart_context_grounding.
metric_definitions.faithfulness: Gemini judge score in official runs; current judge_backend=static-smoke.
metric_definitions.graph_hit_rate: Rate of non-chart-only items with graph candidates or graph-selected context.
metric_definitions.p95_latency_ms: 95th percentile end-to-end runner latency per item.
metric_definitions.retrieval_p95_ms: 95th percentile retrieval latency if node timing is present; null until W6-RAG-01 timing diagnostics are available.

notes: W6-ABL-02 retrieval/fusion/reranker ablation v1. Official metrics require --judge-backend gemini; use --offline-smoke --limit 2 only for local plumbing checks. Dense variants use configs/w6_planner_gated_dense.yaml so Direct chart QA still skips dense by planner gate.
